CustomField.formula: IF(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Active"),"Active",IF(AND(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Candidate"),ISPICKVAL(Credentialling_Status__c, "Billing Only")),"Active",IF(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Candidate"),"Candidate",IF(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Waiting to be Scheduled"),"Active",IF(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "WTBS Here-WRKG at Sister Site"),"Active", IF(AND(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Inactive"),TerminationDate > (TODAY() - 60)),"Active",IF(AND(ISPICKVAL(Status__c,"Superseded"),EffectiveTo > TODAY()),"Active","")))))))
CustomField.label: Provider System Status
